import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let trimmed = string.trim(line)
  let score = match string.parse_int(trimmed)
  when Some(n)
    n
  when None
    0
  end
  let grade = if score >= 90
    "A"
  else if score >= 75
    "B"
  else if score >= 60
    "C"
  else
    "F"
  end
  println(grade)
end
